raw_text:
```json
{
  "claim_texts": [
    "The murder rates of Native American women can be ten times the national average on some reservations.",
    "Jurisdictional confusion has occurred because of a 1953 federal law, Public Law 280, which removed federal criminal jurisdiction over most major offenses committed on reservations.",
    "Public Law 280 limited civil jurisdiction in Indian Country to six states, including California.",
    "AB 3099 would create three new positions within the Department of Justice to assist tribal police concerning crime issues on tribal lands and in Native American communities.",
    "AB 3099 would require the Department of Justice to coordinate education and outreach between tribal police and state and local law enforcement agencies."
  ]
}
```
